name: space-cart-logistics
title: Space Cart Logistics
author: gofarovich
description: Tile-sized rails and externally-routed carts (OHT/AMHS-style), simulated entirely in Lua. Milestone 3: snake-deque convoys with bumper join and split-on-removal, head-gated motion, on top of the cell model (bitmask rails, 32-cell carts, right-hand routing).
